Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPSS1 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Smoking Status Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERAN PLATFORM;**19**;Jul 15, 2017;Build 1 ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DVPXUTL ; Q ; RDSS(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Smoking status READ N DFN,ICN,SMOKINGS,DVPCNT,SMRY S (DFN,ICN)="",SMRY=0 N X F X="smokingStatusId" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) S DVPSITE=$$SITE^VASITE,DVPSTN=$P(DVPSITE,U,3) I SMOKINGS="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Parameter smokingStatusId is required.","RDSS^DVPSS1") I '$$SITECHK^DVPXUTL(SMOKINGS,"RDMR^DVPMR") G QUIT I $P(SMOKINGS,":",5)="",+$P(SMOKINGS,":",6)=0 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","code-invalid","MSG_ID_INVALID","The supplied smokingStatusId "_SMOKINGS_" has an invalid format.","RDSS^DVPSS1") S ICN=$P(SMOKINGS,":",5) I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"RDMR^DVPMR")=0 G QUIT ;N VS D GETREC^GMVUTL(.VS,$P(SMOKINGS,":",6),1) I $G(VS(0))="" D G QUIT ;. D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","not-found","MSG_NO_EXIST","No smokingStatus record found for smokingStatusId "_SMOKINGS_".","RDSS^DVPSS1") N RECSET D FHIRSS(.RECSET,SMOKINGS,0) M @TARGET@("results","smokingStatus")=RECSET QUIT ; Q FHIRSS(REC,VUID,SMRY) ; N ARRAY S REC("identifier")=VUID,REC("id")=$P(VUID,":",6) S (REC("status"),REC("code"),REC("issued"),REC("valueCodeableConcept"))="" K ARRAY D FHIRPAT^DVPXUTL(.ARRAY,$P(VUID,":",5)) M REC("subject")=ARRAY Q
